text: You guys have a miracle coming, I don't know where it's going but you have three giant waves coming.
I don't know where it's going but you have three giant waves coming.
It was a really beautiful clean swim, just a really beautiful ride.
It felt kind of big but the only time it felt big was when I was kicking out and the white
water hit me and it felt like a ton of brick and it was just a teeny little white water.
